programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Kathryn experiences complications related to her pregnancy, motivating Thomas to cosign her lease; Cameran considers seeing a therapist about her reluctance in regards to motherhood; Craig challenges Thomas' commitment to Kathryn.

programme.title: Southern Charm

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Kathryn reaches out to an old friend to make amends; Landon heads to New York for an opportunity; Thomas grows fearful about the health of his unborn child; Craig receives a crushing blow at work, while taking a big step forward with Naomie.

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Craig digs into the past to find the source of the animosity aimed at Kathryn; Cameran reveals more than expected at her therapy session; the gang enjoys the serenity of the Blue Ridge Mountains until secrets are revealed and friendships tested.

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: The trip puts a strain on group dynamics; Craig attempts to salvage his friendships with Cameran and Whitney; Kathryn breaks the news that the baby is coming ahead of schedule, thwarting Thomas' plans to go away to Los Angeles with the guys.

programme.title: Southern Charm

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: After the birth of their son, Thomas and Kathryn take baby steps towards a reconciliation; Landon makes a surprising declaration; Thomas has few reasons to rejoice after shocking revelations and fiery accusations are made during a celebratory dinner.

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Thomas wants to prove that Kathryn and the children should not be overlooked; Patricia takes Landon under her wing and shows her how to make Shep swoon; Thomas hosts a dinner party during which a toast drives the gang apart.

programme.title: Southern Charm

programme.title: Southern Charm

programme.desc: Cameran gets a sneak peek at motherhood; Kathryn's trip to Malibu, Calif., proves to be more than just sunbathing and surfing; Shep confronts Craig about the nature of his legal career; Thomas realizes he needs a stepmother for his children.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan la muerte de un suboficial en un accidente de coche, el equipo de NCIS descubre su oscuro secreto: una vida oculta dedicada a las peleas callejeras.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Durante la semana de Navidad, el equipo de NCIS está trabajando horas extras buscando a un principal sospechoso que se pensaba muerto desde hace 17 años.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS tiene que desentrañar la verdad sobre el asesinato de un guardia de prisión, que provocó un motín y dejó a McGee en manos de los reclusos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Se revelan secretos del pasado de Ducky cuando aparece apuñalado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar cadáveres congelados flotando en el lago en Nevada, la investigación de UAC los lleva a sospechar que las víctimas formaban parte de una secta que podría estar detrás de las muertes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está buscando a un asesino serial en Tallahasseeen, que llama a las autoridades para informar de los crímenes antes de cometer un asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Se revelan secretos del pasado de Ducky cuando aparece apuñalado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el extraño asesinato de un capitán de la Marina, sospechando que su vida privada turbulenta podría ser la razón de su muerte.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Bella

programme.title: 10 años
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos se reencuentran en la reunión de alumnos de su secundaria. Cada uno tiene una historia increíble para contar.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: El citadino Ren MacCormack se muda a un pequeño pueblo donde el rock and roll y el baile están prohibidos. Su espíritu rebelde sacude a la población.

programme.title: Los hermanos del hierro
programme.desc: Reynaldo y Martín Del Hierro son testigos del asesinato de su padre por parte de Pascual Velazco. Mientras crecen, son envenenados por el deseo de venganza de su madre, pero una vez que lo consiguen cambiará sus vidas para siempre.

programme.title: Aquí Está Tu Enamorado
programme.desc: Antonio es un apuesto "Don Juan" al que le encantan las mujeres, pero huye del matrimonio como del diablo. Todo se complicará cuando pretende a la novia del comisiario y la llegada de un "paquete" misterioso.

programme.title: Cien muchachas

programme.title: El mundo loco de los jovenes
programme.desc: Un muchacho decide irse de su casa y se enfrenta a su padre cuando éste se opone a su amor por la música. Una encantadora historia comienza a tejerse cuando conoce a su profesora de canto.

programme.title: La marca de Satanás
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato conmociona a los habitantes de un pequeño pueblo rural; pero las cosas apenas comienzan cuando varias fuerzas malignas comienzan a plagar la ciudad.

programme.title: Duelo de pistoleros
programme.desc: El duelo por ser el mejor en la comarca, duelo por ser quien mande en ese sitio pero sobre todo duelo por tan lindas mujeres.

programme.title: La cabeza de Pancho Villa
programme.desc: En sus últimos resoplos de vida, un hombre entrega una caja a sus amigos, pidiéndoles protegerla con su propia vida. Un grupo de forajidos anda tras la caja, lo que desatará una pugna sanguinaria.

programme.title: Capitan de rurales
programme.desc: El joven capitán de un grupo conocido como los rurales es perseguido por el gobierno mexicano por defender los derechos de los campesinos de las injusticias, pero en esta odisea contará con el apoyo del pueblo.

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: Este éxito escalofriante y aclamado por la crítica acelerará sus corazones desde el principio hasta el fin.

programme.title: Sangre, sudor y gloria
programme.desc: Un equipo de fisicoculturistas de Miami llevan una vida de lujo a través del secuestro y de la extorsión en esta comedia policial basada en una historia real.

programme.title: Regresión
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke y Emma Watson estelarizan este thriller sobre un crimen en un pueblo pequeño que desenmascara un terrible misterio nacional.

programme.title: Caza Terrorista

programme.title: Bajo anestesia
programme.desc: Mientras se somete a una cirugía, un joven adinerado experimenta una conciencia intraoperatoria y descubre que el equipo quirúrgico tenía la intención de asesinarlo.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: El escritor fantasma
programme.desc: El cineasta Roman Polanski eleva la tensión en este thriller sobre un escritor (Ewan McGregor) encargado de redactar las vivencias de un ex primer ministro (Pierce Brosnan).

programme.title: Fuimos héroes
programme.desc: En 1965, Estados Unidos está en guerra con Vietnam del Norte, y el teniente coronel Hal Moore prepara a sus tropas para una de las batallas más violentas de la historia de EE. UU.: “El valle de la muerte”.

programme.title: La conquista del honor

programme.title: Frontera hostil
programme.desc: Luego de ser deportada, Claudia debe elegir entre reconciliarse con su padre, de quien está distanciada, o juntarse con un peligroso contrabandista para poder volver a Estados Unidos.

programme.title: 1984 (ESP)
programme.desc: Adaptación del clásico de George Orwell sobre el totalitarismo en un mundo futurista atroz donde el gobierno regula y monitorea todo, hasta el último detalle. John Hurt, Richard Burton, Suzanna Hamilton, Cyril Cusack, Gregor Fisher, James Walker

programme.title: En defensa del honor
programme.desc: Bruce Willis interpreta a un oficial encarcelado que se niega a abandonar su lucha contra los nazis, incluso desde detrás de las líneas de los enemigos.

programme.title: La conquista del honor
programme.desc: Del director ganador del premio de la Academia Clint Eastwood y del ganador del premio de la Academia Steven Spielberg, llega la historia de los seis hombres que izaron la bandera en la Batalla de Iwo Jima, un punto de inflexión en la Segunda Guerra.

programme.title: Venganza letal
programme.desc: La estrella de acción Dwayne Johnson interpreta a Driver, un hombre libre que, tras estar una década en prisión, se enfoca en encontrar a los responsables del brutal asesinato de su hermano. Pero dos personas harán lo que sea para detenerlo.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis exmilitares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Tirador
programme.desc: Decidido a probar su inocencia en una traición, Bob Lee Swagger se encuentra ahora en una tensa carrera contra todas las fuerzas de la ley de los Estados Unidos y contra una organización oscura que quiere verlo muerto.

programme.title: Venganza letal
programme.desc: La estrella de acción Dwayne Johnson interpreta a Driver, un hombre libre que, tras estar una década en prisión, se enfoca en encontrar a los responsables del brutal asesinato de su hermano. Pero dos personas harán lo que sea para detenerlo.

programme.title: Portadores
programme.desc: Chris Pine protagoniza este intenso y cautivante thriller, Portadores. Es la terrorífica historia de cuatro adolescentes que descubren que son más peligrosos para sí mismos que el virus global mortal del que intentan escapar.

programme.title: Asesino Kung Fu
programme.desc: Donnie Yen es un asesino y experto en kung fu, reclutado por la policía para rastrear a un asesino a cambio de recuperar su libertad.

programme.title: Monster Trucks

programme.title: La familia Addams
programme.desc: Ven y únete a La Familia Addams ¡para el festival del terror más hilarante de la temporada o de cualquier otra

programme.title: Motín a bordo
programme.desc: Un viaje idílico a Tahití enfrentará a la tripulación y su capitán, cuando tras encontrar un paraíso tropical y sexo ilimitado, el capitán decide zarpar y adentrar a su tripulación en un peligroso viaje alrededor del Cabo de Hornos.

programme.title: El hombre de la máscara de hierro
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio lidera un elenco fenomenal en esta emocionante historia de majestad y mosqueteros. Cuando el arrogante rey Luis XIV de Francia comienzan a amenazar la vida de sus súbditos, ¡los legendarios mosqueteros se reúnen para salvar su país!

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el piloto?
programme.desc: Considerada "una de las 10 películas más divertidas de la historia" por el American Film Institute, "¿Y dónde está el piloto?" es una obra maestra de la comedia de disparate.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el piloto? II
programme.desc: El primer transbordador espacial comercial envía al chiflado Ted (Robert Hays) y a su exnovia (Julie Hagerty) a un viaje a la Luna.

programme.title: Te amo, brother
programme.desc: Un futuro novio sin amigos conoce al compañero más genial y los dos comienzan una relación de hermandad masculina que te tendrá riendo hasta el final.

programme.title: Casi famosos
programme.desc: Un chico de secundaria tiene la oportunidad de escribir una historia para la revista Rolling Stone sobre una banda emergente mientras los acompaña en su gira.

programme.title: Una película de miedo
programme.desc: En esta divertida parodia de una película de terror, un grupo de adolescentes son acosados por un psicópata enmascarado. Protagonizada por Carmen Electra, Marlon Wayans, Jon Abrahams, Shannon Elizabeth, Shawn Wayans, y Anna Faris.

programme.title: Scary movie 2: Otra película de miedo
programme.desc: ¡Alguien llevó demasiado lejos a tu amor por las secuelas! Regresan los personajes cómicos favoritos de 'Scary Movie', con mayor diversión e irreverente de la película original.

programme.title: Besos de Azúcar
programme.desc: Nacho es un niño que intenta sobrevivir los primeros años de su adolescencia como refugiado bailando en una máquina. Su vida cambia drásticamente cuando conoce a Mayra.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Neruda
programme.desc: At the start of the Cold War, subversive Chilean senator and poet Pablo Neruda is pursued by police prefect Oscar Peluchonneau. Unable to flee the country, Neruda goes into hiding and becomes a symbol of liberty at home and in Europe.

programme.title: María Montez: la película
programme.desc: Era conocida como "La reina del tecnicolor" en Hollywood y Europa, pero a medida que se hacía más famosa, se sentía más vacía. Una startlet que no podía encontrar el amor o la felicidad hasta que fue demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Camino a Marte
programme.desc: Fue amor a primera vista entre José y Abril, pero un accidente causa la muerte de José. En el cielo lo tiene todo, excepto a Abril. José convence a su ángel de la guardia de dejarlo volver a Tierra.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: Mientrtas Donna y Vic Trenton luchan para salvar tambaleante su matrimonio, su hijo Tad se hace amigo del adorable San Bernardo de 90 kilos de su mecánico.

programme.title: Event Horizon: La nave de la muerte
programme.desc: En 2047, un equipo de astronautas se embarca en una misión para recuperar una nave espacial. Sin embargo, esta simple tarea los conducirá a algo mucho más aterrador de lo que imaginaban.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: La conspiración del diablo
programme.desc: Un culto satánico roba la Sábana Santa de Turín para fines malvados.

programme.title: Terrifier (ESP)
programme.desc: Art el payaso regresa y pone su mirada en tres mujeres jóvenes, junto con cualquiera que se meta en su camino.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: La hermandad
programme.desc: Edward Dalton (Ethan Hawke) es investigador en 2019, año en que una plaga convirtió en vampiros a la población. A medida que los humanos se extinguen, los vampiros deben encontrar un sustituto de la sangre. Un hallazgo puede salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Alias Jesse James
programme.desc: In this hilarious western spoof, insurance broker Milford Farnsworth (Bob Hope) unwittingly sells a life insurance policy worth $100,000 to the infamous Jesse James. Now, he has to figure out how to keep the deadliest outlaw in history alive!

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: Cowboy Serenade
programme.desc: When a young man is sent to sell cattle to a packing plant, he is soon swindled by card sharks. Gene Autry is sent to investigate and recover the cattle, find the young man, and clear his name.

programme.title: Heart Of The Rio Grande
programme.desc: Gene Autry tames a spoiled teenage shrew sent to a Dude Ranch for the summer and in the process humanizes her father into being a better parent. Action includes stampeding horses, and a bold rescue!

programme.title: Home in Wyomin'
programme.desc: Radio star Gene Autry must solve a murder mystery at the Frontier Days pageant in Wyoming that involves a newspaper photographer, Chicago gangsters, a deserted mine, and a surprise ending.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: Fort Massacre
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Strategic Air Command
programme.desc: Aviation and sports come together as a baseball player is recalled to Air Force duty.

programme.title: The High and the Mighty
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Dan Roman, a veteran pilot haunted by a tragic past. Now relegated to second-incommand cockpit assignments, he finds himself scheduled on a routine Honolulu-to-San Francisco flight – one that takes a terrifying turn.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: A stellar cast, including Michael Caine, Laurence Olivier and Christopher Plummer highlights this epic telling of the greatest air battle in history, when the outnumbered Royal Air Force defeated the German Luftwaffe, saving England from invasion.

programme.title: Whoever Slew Auntie Roo?
programme.desc: Shelley Winters puts the Grande in Grande Dame Guignol in this atmospheric chiller! After the death of her daughter, Auntie Roo (Winters) has been looking for a 'dead ringer' replacement. And this time she found one...from the local orphanage!

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: The Desperate Hours
programme.desc: Bogart plays an escaped con who has nothing to lose. March is a suburban Everyman who has everything to lose - his family is held hostage by Bogart.

programme.title: We're No Angels
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart plays one of his rare comedy roles in this jaunty excursion about three convicts - Joseph (Bogart), Albert (Aldo Ray) and Jules (Peter Ustinov) - who are plotting their escape from Devil's Island.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa becomes enchanted with the diary of a Lydia Plunkett. Found in an old trunk in the barn, the diary from 1898 tells Lydia's life story as a successful businesswoman. Eb and Lisa are glued to every page of the story, but Oliver isn't impressed.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney and Fred Ziffel try to persuade Oliver to invest in a new business venture. 'Looney Luke' Needlinger claim to have invented a machine that can turn hay into fresh milk. Oliver is skeptical and tries to prove the machine is a white lie.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver returns home with Arnold, the citizens in town hold a large reception for Arnold. But when Oliver receives a phone call from a lawyer representing an eccentric relative of the Birnbachers, the riches go into question.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's 'Mudder' pays a surprise visit to Lisa and Oliver. Eb good-naturedly introduces her as the Queen of Sicily. As a result, the entire town treats her like royalty. They even go so far as to hold a special day in her honor.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Arnold Ziffel, Hooterville's beloved swine is thought to have rightful claim to a $20,000 fortune. The Birnbacher pork empire has promised that the descendant of the famous weather-predicting pig, Herman, will inherit the vast sum.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver, Lisa and Eb travel to Chicago with Arnold to prove the pig is the rightful heir to the Birnbacher pork empire. Will this pig get rich? Arnold makes a surprising prediction that baffles all, including all the lawyers involved.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa foretells of a mysterious stranger that will appear into Oliver's life. Enter Tadpole Talbot, Eb's childhood friend who has become a singing sensation. Tadpole has convinced Eb to go out on the road with him and join his band as a roadie.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie finds himself in a compromising situation with an attractive waitress after Edith ignores his amorous advances and dashes off to the Sunshine Home.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: And estranged Archie and Edith are determined to prove to each other that they are perfectly content going their separate ways, in the conclusion of a three-part presentation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The family is getting ready to celebrate Mike's good fortune, he's been published. It happens just at the wrong moment because Archie has just been laid off due to the recall of a government contract.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie continues to have problems with finances and with finding another job. At the grocery store, he stresses himself about Edith's spending habits and tries to save money even if it means denting cans to save two cents.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: After slugging Maude when he was loaded the night before, Walter comes downstairs the next morning full of guilt and remorse and wallowing in self-pity. Although Walter has promised to stop drinking, a phone call from his office sets him off again.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter declares his own 'I Love You Day' holiday, but his plans to spend a romantic day with Maude are thwarted by Vivian, Maude's best friend, who insists on unloading her divorce-proceedings problems.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Vivian returns from a five-week vacation looking ten years younger, everyone -- with one exception, tells her how great she looks. Vivian accuses Maude of being jealous of her new, youthful look.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude has decided the only thing that can lift her spirits is a face-lift operation. Now, she's been away several weeks and the whole clan is waiting for the first look at the results.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Is it fair for a woman to admit being attracted to a man other than her husband? The man repairing the Findlay's furnace is more interested in lighting Florida's fire than in heating the house and refuses to take no for an answer.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude takes a part-time job selling real estate she discovers she may have to choose between her newly acquired real estate license and her marriage license. Walter is not ready to settle for a part-time wife.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar spend a rainy weekend in the country looking for a lost girl

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Cyrus Chambers and Tom Dalton are business partners in town, but when Cyrus decides he wants out of the partnership the trouble starts. Money and a secret love affair drive Tom to stop at nothing to bring Cyrus down, not even murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Wilson Sweet is curious about the murder of his grandfather over forty years ago and finds the incident may not have happened like he was told. An old bluesman in town has written a song about the murder and brings light to what really happened.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: For Bubba Skinner and his date Mary Ellen, a picnic ends in gunshots and the discovery of a large marijuana operation. When the wrong bullet slug is found on the ballistics report, Gillespie and Tibbs suspect that a Sheriff’s Deputy may be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: District Attorney Gerard Darnelle is tough on criminals and has made many enemies throughout his long career. When his daughter is kidnapped, the FBI arrives, but Gillespie and Tibbs sidestep them and follow their own leads to bring her home safely.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A trio of violent prison escapees leaves a trail of blood by murdering or crippling everyone they see.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Kidnapping and murder are linked to a boy stealing medicine for his ailing sister.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman "takes from the rich and gives to the poor" to help with fellow senior citizens' medical expenses.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Believing her baby was kidnapped, not stillborn as people claim, a mother embarks on a murderous quest to find the truth.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The killing of a cop by another cop is investigated, with the question of accidental vs. intentional up in the air.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: The wife of a wealthy industrialist disappears from their sailboat off the coast of Mexico, and he initially hires Mannix to learn how she disappeared.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A Vietnam war hero who married into the family of an aircraft manufacturer is killed by a grenade tossed into an elevator just before the doors close.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A young man whom his associates know as Dan Turner arrives in Los Angeles, where he separates from them and boards a bus for Palmdale.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.desc: The police look for James in the Marsh murder. Bobby and Shelly tell Truman Leo escaped and Bobby reveals that he saw Hank shoot Leo the night the mill burned. Albert returns to Twin Peaks with information on Windom Earle.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Harry sinks into a deep depression after Josie's death. Josie's body holds more questions then answers. Norma's troubled sister, Annie, arrives in Twin Peaks. Wheeler and Audrey hit it off. Cooper's stalemate angers Earle.

programme.title: Hunter

programme.title: Hunter

programme.title: Hunter

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.desc: Mama is getting annoyed with Naomi at Food Circus and tells all her customers to go to a different checker. Mr. Palmer, the manager, gets to talking with Mama, who gives him advice, and he ends up offering her a job.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint takes Naomi to a romantic motel to celebrate their one-year anniversary, and Mama tags along to assist Aunt Effie, who fell. When Mama leaves Aunt Effie after a fight, she is forced to spend the night with Vint and Naomi.

programme.desc: A boy at school likes Buffy but does not talk to her. Cissy thinks the boys do not like her because there is something wrong with her, so Uncle Bill pays to have different people coach her in dress, makeup, talking, walking, and more.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A forensic dentist helps police nab a child killer by showing that the teeth marks on the killer's arms match the teeth of the murdered boy. And telltale blood stains on a blue bandana solve the 10-year-old case of a teenage girl murdered.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: DNA found on a marijuana joint in Florida in 2005 helps to solve the 1988 rape and murder of a California woman. And a cold case of murder in Illinois heats up when a jailhouse lawyer turns jailhouse snitch.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police run down more than 11,000 leads before coming up with a suspect in the murders of three Virginia girls, and the abduction and strangulation of a California woman continue to baffle the investigators more than 11 years after the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Forty-one years after the crime, a woman implicates her brother and cousin in the murder of a policeman.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Easter Sunday of 1992, the body of missing woman Lisa Ziegert is found in a field. The investigation yields hundreds of leads but no true suspect. After more than two decades on ice, the case is revived.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Cops finally close in on a serial killer with the help of the Internet. And a drug trafficker jumps bail goes into the bike shop business and helps pioneer the sport of mountain biking while he's on the lam.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 13-year-old Jennifer Bastian is abducted and murdered in August of 1986, residents of Tacoma panic. This is the second young girl killed in five months. Convinced a predator is loose, Police embark on a 32-year inquiry.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: This is the story of the hunt for one of the most notorious serial killers in American history--the BTK killer. After committing at least seven brutal murders he vanished for over 25 years before sending clues of his crimes to the media in 2004.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A highly-regarded California arson investigator is suspected of setting a series of fires, and in Texas, a man is convicted of raping and murdering his 68-year-old neighbor.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A murderer's saliva, found on envelopes, helps seal his doom 37 years after his first killing. And Colorado police crack a cold case 24 years later when they take a DNA sample from the victim's son that proves that his father murdered his mother.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A detective vows not to shave until he solves the murder of a young Oregon woman. It takes three years and a string of Mexican Mafia informants to crack the case and allow the dedicated detective to shave his beard.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A dry cleaning tag inside a sweatshirt left at a crime scene helps police track down a serial killer and rapist who had been eluding them for years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a 15-year-old girl is found murdered in her grandparents' home. For decades, a stalled investigation only fuels the town rumor mill, pointing an accusing finger at her 13-year-old sister.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew agrees to help Dallas salvage Prom and is punished.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya fails her CPR and now she can’t spend the summer lifeguarding at the beach with Zig.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone’s spooked by Gloria’s disappearance as strange things continue to happen.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Determined to get to the bottom of Mr. Bane’s creepy info trove, Zoe and Grace break into his car only to discover more incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Stephanie uses her new-found sexuality to campaign for the school presidency, her best friend questions her motivation and her methods. Meanwhile, Stephanie's younger brother Arthur is having difficulty adjusting to grade seven.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Voula disobeys her Old World father and sneaks out to the school dance. But when Stephanie gets too drunk to deliver her speech, Voula has to take over, risking exposure of her deception.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Feeling unfairly treated by Mr. Raditch, Yick puts his name on an old paper of Stephanie's to test his teacher's response. Meanwhile, Joey sells phony drugs to Melanie and Kathleen.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Rick, the school tough guy, is a loner who rarely speaks to anyone. When Joey visits Rick's home, he is horrified to discover that his new friend's bruises are inflicted by his own father. Joey wants to help but doesn’t want to betray Rick's confidence.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Responding to sexist taunts, the girls' swim team challenges the boys' soccer team to a battle of the sexes. But when star swimmer Melanie gets teased about her first bra, she pulls out of the race.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Whispered stories about Caitlin's favorite teacher, Ms. Avery, hint that she is a lesbian. Troubled by the accusations and by doubts about her own sexuality, Caitlin confronts Ms. Avery, who helps her understand that rumors never tell the whole story.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When LD.'s father is suddenly taken to the hospital, LD. Is terrified that she will lose him, as she lost her mother. Meanwhile, Melanie has to confront her own unfounded fear when a snake gets loose in school.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Voula befriends Lucy, but, when the two girls go shopping, she learns that Lucy keeps her stylish wardrobe up to date by shoplifting. Meanwhile, Step learns what it means to take responsibility for her actions.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Rick, a poor student and loner at Degrassi, joins a committee in order to get to know Caitlin. Despite an unfriendly welcome from Kathleen, Caitlin supports Rick and they work together on a successful project.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: At one of Lucy's parties, Spike and Shane lock themselves in a bedroom, where one thing leads to another. When her period is late, Spike has to confront the consequences of her actions.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Wheels' real father shows up out of the blue, he must deal with his feelings about his adoptive parents, his birth parents and his own identity. Spike confirms that she is pregnant, and she approaches Wheels for advice on the option of abortion.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: To make Wheels jealous, Stephanie, the school president, appoints Joey as the Sports Rep., even though the post is supposed to be held by a seventh grader. As a result, the seventh grade class wants to impeach her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Spike is confused about whether she should keep her baby and whether she can remain friends with Shane, the baby's father. When her teen-mother counseling group conducts an experiment, Shane begin to realize the responsibilities of parenthood.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Feeling alone and vulnerable because her parents are always working, Lucy is pleased when a substitute teacher takes a special interest in her. However, she soon discovers that his desires go beyond simply wanting to help her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Joey makes an after-school study date with the new girl, Liz, who has a fast reputation. He prepares for the date by buying condoms, but discovers a different person than he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Spike and Shane's parents finally meet and all agree adoption is best for Spike's baby. Shane, however, has his own ideas. Meanwhile, Melanie breaks a date with Yick to go out with Snake, but her deception is discovered.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed as an epileptic, Caitlin is having a hard time accepting her condition. She convinces her mother to let her audition for the school play, but then nearly drops out - blaming her disease - when she doesn't get the part.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When, in response to Joey's ridicule, Dwayne challenges him to a fight, Joey feels he has to go through with it. Meanwhile, Stephanie finally realizes, after weeks of flirtation, that Simon is interested in Alexa, not her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When the Degrassi Jr. High quiz team goes to Kathleen's house to prepare for a match, they discover that Kathleen's mother is an alcoholic. Rich and Caitlin offer Kathleen their support.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Sick of being confused with her twin sister Heather, Erica is determined to define herself as an individual. She finds an opportunity at the Spring Dance, where she is found passionately kissing a strange boy!

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: As Stephanie's mother makes plans to remarry and her father continues to fight for custody of her and her brother, Stephanie becomes increasingly despondent. She even starts to talk about suicide.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A group of parents demands that Spike be moved to another school because her pregnancy sets a bad example. Some of the students agree, but Caitlin writes an article for the school newspaper supporting Spike.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Trapped by the Wirrn, The Doctor and his friends are forced into one last terrible gamble.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Time Lords send the Doctor, Sarah and Harry to a time shortly before the creation of the Daleks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor finds that some of Davros's fellow Kaleds are unhappy with the development of the Daleks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor informs the Kaled government of Davros's experiments and they move to shut down the bunker.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Davros interrogates the Doctor, forcing him to reveal the future of the Daleks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Kaled elite move to prevent the development of the Daleks while the Doctor hopes to destroy them forever.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: While on holiday in Paris, the Doctor and Romana experience a time distortion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scarlioni is planning to steal the Mona Lisa. Yet he has six in his cellar - all genuine.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Count Scarlioni is really Scaroth, last of the Jagaroth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scaroth intends to travel back in time to save his own people from destruction.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Meglos plans to steal the ancient and powerful Dodecahedron from Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Posing as the Doctor, Meglos penetrates the underground city of Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Meglos escapes with the Dodecahedron and the Doctor is mistakenly held responsible.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor must prevent Meglos from using the dodecahedron to destroy Tigella.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: With the TARDIS disabled, the Doctor is powerless to act when Romana is kidnapped.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to repair the TARDIS so that he can come to Romana's rescue.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana suspect that the Nimon are a small part of a large invasion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: On Crinoth, Romana discovers the truth behind the Nimon's empty promises.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana visit the Leisure Hive, a tourist attraction on the planet Argolis.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana track down the cause of the mysterious deaths at the Leisure Hive.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Tachyon Recreation Generator ages the Doctor into a white haired old man.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The obsessed Pangol is determined to give Argolis a future and strike back at the Foamasi.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix; a cocker spaniel with a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese hates being on his leash; an American Eskimo barks and circles strangers who enter the house; a Nova Scotia duck tolling retriever with a fear of pools.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a pregnant Ashlee Simpson-Wentz's English bulldog with his aggression issues before the baby arrives; a retriever with food aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa apso eats everything she can get her paws on.

programme.desc: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/shar pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vicious Chihuahua frightens the pit bulls at the rescue center where he lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter: Baby's Back in Town
programme.desc: Dog tries to nab a fugitive, named Wayne, by calling and telling him that he's won a new vacuum cleaner and he should stick around to get it. Dog then sends his daughter, Lyssa, to "deliver" the vacuum cleaner and lure Wayne out of his house.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake mortgages the mansion to raise money; Tracy tells Alexis of her affair with Dex; Alexis is questioned about Mark's death; Sammy Jo intends to obtain custody of her son; an unknown woman, full of curiosity about Alexis, checks into La Mirage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby's attempt to kill Alexis is unsuccessful, and Alexis promises to remain silent if Kirby will leave Adam; Sammy Jo reveals the culprit behind Claudia's mystery calls; Fallon is gripped with a seizure and drives off as her wedding is about to begin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven accuses Adam of conspiring with Sammy Jo to kidnap Danny. Blake arranges to take out a mortgage on the mansion. He little suspects Alexis has signed the note and will become the owner if he defaults.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Steven testified he saw Alexis push Mark to his death. Jeff sees other women in an attempt to forget Fallon but remains obsessed with his ex-wife. Alexis takes the stand and testifies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam and Dex vow to prove Alexis' innocence and begin a determined campaign. The woman who testified she had seen Alexis on the terrace with Mark had hosted a party that evening and snapped photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda insists Alexis acknowledge their relationship and begs her to reveal her father's identity. Alexis tells her it was simply an anonymous ski instructor in Gstaad. Steven and Alexis reconcile.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean to dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle goes into premature labor and delivers a baby girl, who suffers from respiratory problems. She names the child Kristina after a friend who once saved her life. Claudia is uneasy when Steven accompanies Luke on a business trip.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning that he may be Amanda's father, Blake resolves to ask Amanda to take a blood test. Nicole tells Jeff there's a chance Peter DeVilbis may have been with another woman at the time of the crash.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake buys back his racehorse Allegre from owner Daniel Reece, who sends Krystle a gift. Furious, she demands to know how he dared approach her after what happened with her sister, Iris. Amanda learns she is Blake's daughter.

programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Chi falls have run dry. Eris and the Beavers try to get to mount Cavora to learn why. The Crocodiles blame the Lions and are rallying the Wolves, Ravens, even Rhinos for an attack to conquer the remaining Chi.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Chi falls of Mt. Cavora are still not running. The Black Cloud still looms. The battle for the Chi is on.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The heroes of Chima learn that the Gorilla and Rhino Legend Beasts have been captured by a Tribe of creepy Spiders.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Wanting to prove himself as a serious musician to Zoey, Logan inadvertently unleashes his 'sick beats' on the dream world resulting in much mayhem.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers go after their missing memories and the dream chasers try find the Never Witch's hide-out while Phil covers for them at Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers feel like they should be taking the fight to the Never Witch instead of training for R.E.M. trials. Zoey's haunted by her most painful memories and Mateo continues to only dream craft Z-Blob-related items.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Set in the past, the dream chaser duo Hannah and Beau argue while young Oz searches for Lunia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey tries to rebuild a relationship with her estranged dad and Logan steps up his training to beat Astrid.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A close call with the Never Witch places Mateo in the forests of Wildoria while Beau is on an adventure in the dream world with Zoey.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure. Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it. Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread to get him to act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous "Cubby the Cop" balloon on the city. Fire Chief McCloud accidentally buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny dons powerful dino-mech armor to dig up Cap'n No-Beard's treasure beneath Mt. Sibo, making him more than a match for our heroes ... and a mighty allosaurus that unexpectedly joins the party!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Zane's search for Arin leads to an old friend but lands him in the middle of the Forbidden Five's hunt for the Prismatic Blades.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja learn of the Forbidden Five's quest to collect the Prismatic Blades, meanwhile Ras finally leads Arin to his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Sora, Nya and Riyu are summoned to New Djinjago to help a friend, and the mystery bounty hunter receives a new mission.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.desc: A mentally disturbed suspect refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering him incapable of standing trial for murder.

programme.desc: The parents of a missing child accuse each other of having the baby until a gruesome discovery is made.

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Join the Little Angel on a family fun fiesta, where they embark on a series of heartwarming adventures that celebrate the joys of togetherness and learning.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para un día de diversión! Desde cantar con globos hasta imitar sonidos de animales, canciones infantiles, partes del cuerpo, citas con el abuelo, sueños de dinosaurios y confiar en el médico, ¡es un día de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en un día lleno de emociones con Little Angel! Desde campamentos y aventuras piratas hasta visitas al zoológico, competencias de castillos de arena, aventuras heladas y la alegría navideña, ¡cada aventura es un tesoro de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus tiernos viajes. Desde el amor entre hermanos hasta la perseverancia, pasando por la alegría de los cumpleaños, la diversión en el salón y la salud, ¡todo un tesoro de lecciones envueltas en amor y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Little Angel te invita a unirte a sus divertidas aventuras con canciones. Prepárate para cantar, bailar y reír mientras le dan vida a las canciones infantiles clásicas de la forma más divertida.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en una actividad familiar. Jugarán y crearán recuerdos para toda la vida.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus fiestas de juegos, donde descubren la alegría de ayudar y marcar la diferencia, demostrando que incluso los actos de bondad más pequeños pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels y aprende sobre sus amigos los animales en esta emocionante aventura que seguro les arrancará muchas sonrisas a los más pequeños.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas. Con sus amigos y familiares, Mía, de 6 años, experimenta el mundo que la rodea a través de canciones.

programme.desc: Viewing a heated argument from his hotel window, Matlock witnesses a murder involving two stars of a local theater production and an unhappy husband. When he helps investigate the case, his memory becomes a bit blurred.

programme.desc: The serenity of historic Roanoke Island is shattered when a retired career soldier attempts to prove his late brother’s death was not a hunting accident, but murder.
